violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee went to front of house and returned to kitchen without hand wash before donning gloves for food prep.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Raspberry sauce made in house had date mark of 4/19. *Directed to dispose of product.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a warewash sink. -Two employees washed hands at ware wash sink. *Redirected while on-site.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hand sink had dish soap and gloves in basin upon arrival.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Guacamole was being thawed in 65F water at prep sink. *Ensure thawing is done under cold running or under refrigeration.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hand sink had cleaning supplies in basin and access was impeded by empty boxes.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee cigarettes were top shelf of the soup cart. *Removed immediately.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
